name: Creative pairings
prompts: Whose work style is most opposite to yours — and what would you build together?
Name someone on the team you've never shipped anything with. What's an excuse to change that?
What's a pairing you wish would happen but probably won't on its own?
Who taught you something this quarter without realizing they were teaching?
Pick two people who should swap roles for a day. Why?
Whose feedback consistently makes your work better?
What's a skill someone here has that's wildly underused?
If you could borrow one person's brain for a 1-hour question, whose and which question?
